fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly converts planned floating-point allocations to integers by simple truncation on line 70. This causes the sum of the final allocations to be less than the total available credits when there are fractional parts.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer-truncated allocations must equal the total credits.
The sum of planned floating-point allocations must equal the total credits.
The sum of the final allocated credits must equal the total credits.
